response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Handled lyrics and dialogue matches. Corrected several phonetic inaccuracies in the raw lyrics reference, such as 'どんな自然も' to 'どんな試練も' in Song 1, and verified 'Realize!' as the PriPara theme song, correctly transcribing the lyric 'いつか行こうよ プリパラ'.
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics context to disambiguate the fast-paced vocals and manually transcribed all the spoken dialogue segments between the two musical performances.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the subtitles tightly to the onset and offset of vocal delivery. Used visual-event subtitling to display the song title card of 'Realize!' during the instrumental introduction, and strictly prevented cascading delays in the dialogue scene.

subtitles.original: いっくよー！
subtitles.english: Let's go!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: いけるビート弾く僕ら
subtitles.english: Playing the driving beat, we are...

subtitles.original: 手を叩いて！
subtitles.english: Clap your hands!

subtitles.original: Yeah!
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: 無限のリズムで弾むみんな
subtitles.english: Everyone bouncing to the infinite rhythm!

subtitles.original: Yeah!
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: どこでだって
subtitles.english: Wherever we are,

subtitles.original: 僕は君の翼に
subtitles.english: I will become your wings...

subtitles.original: なれる勇気があるよ
subtitles.english: ...I have the courage to do so.

subtitles.original: どんな試練も怖くない
subtitles.english: I'm not afraid of any trials,

subtitles.original: その魔法があるからね
subtitles.english: because we have that magic.

subtitles.original: 君と出会い 世界は
subtitles.english: Meeting you, the world...

subtitles.original: 花束に溢れた
subtitles.english: ...overflowed with bouquets of flowers.

subtitles.original: ただその瞬間の すべてが宝物だよ
subtitles.english: Just that single moment, everything is a treasure.

subtitles.original: ちぐはぐなコミュニケーション
subtitles.english: Awkward communication,

subtitles.original: でも別に構わない
subtitles.english: but I don't really mind,

subtitles.original: 明日が平和なら
subtitles.english: as long as tomorrow is peaceful.

subtitles.original: イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: ピースピース！
subtitles.english: Peace, peace!

subtitles.original: いちばんうれしい いつも
subtitles.english: The happiest, always...

subtitles.original: Chu!
subtitles.english: Chu!

subtitles.original: はーい！ありがとうー！
subtitles.english: Yay! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: やりきったー！
subtitles.english: We did it!

subtitles.original: やりきりましたー！
subtitles.english: We did our best!

subtitles.original: ねね、間違えたけど、多分気づかれてないから大丈夫！
subtitles.english: I made a mistake, but I'm sure no one noticed, so it's fine!

subtitles.original: よかった、私も間違えました！
subtitles.english: Thank goodness, I made a mistake too!

subtitles.original: あ、間違えた？大丈夫、みんな大丈夫！
subtitles.english: Oh, you did? It's fine, we're all fine!

subtitles.original: あ、あ、間違えた？あははは、でもみんなあってる、大丈夫、大丈夫、大丈夫！
subtitles.english: Ah, wait, did you make a mistake? Ahaha, but everyone was in sync, so it's fine!

subtitles.original: えー、というわけで今日はねねの誕生日の記念ライブに、かわいい後輩二人に来てもらいました！
subtitles.english: So, for Nene's birthday concert today, I invited these two cute juniors to join me!

subtitles.original: ねね先輩、お誕生日おめでとうございます！
subtitles.english: Nene-senpai, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとうー！ありがとうー！
subtitles.english: Thank you! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: リアルねねち！
subtitles.english: Real Nenechi!

subtitles.original: リアルねねち！いや、いい！
subtitles.english: Real Nenechi! Wow, this is great!

subtitles.original: いや、変な動き求められてる、おきに、おきに。
subtitles.english: Wait, they're asking for weird movements. My favorite, my favorite.

subtitles.original: 曲より動いてるから、今めっちゃ息切れしましたよ。
subtitles.english: We moved more than the song required, so I'm completely out of breath now.

subtitles.original: でも、嬉しいですよ、呼んでいただいて。本当に嬉しい。
subtitles.english: But I'm really glad you invited us. I'm so happy.

subtitles.original: ね、本当に。踊ってくれると思わなかった。
subtitles.english: Yeah, really. I didn't think you'd dance with us.

subtitles.original: いや、二人のライブ見てから、完成度が高すぎて一回呼ぼうと思ったけど、やっぱやめようかなって思って。
subtitles.english: Well, after seeing your lives, the quality was so high. I thought about inviting you, but then I thought maybe I shouldn't.

subtitles.original: なんでよ！なんでよ！一緒にやろうよ！
subtitles.english: Why?! Why?! Let's do it together!

subtitles.original: 一緒にできないと思って、でも今回頑張っちゃいました！
subtitles.english: I thought we couldn't do it together, but I did my best this time!

subtitles.original: いやー、よかったです！嬉しい！
subtitles.english: No way, we're so glad! We're so happy!

subtitles.original: デビューしてからの目標が、先輩と一緒にステージで歌って踊ることだったから...
subtitles.english: Since my debut, my goal has been to sing and dance on stage with my senpai...

subtitles.original: それが今日叶ったんです！
subtitles.english: And that dream came true today!

subtitles.original: えー！本当に嬉しい！よかった！
subtitles.english: Aw! I'm so happy to hear that! I'm glad!

subtitles.original: 初めてのステージで歌えた！よかったー！
subtitles.english: We sang together on stage for the first time! I'm so glad!

subtitles.original: やったー！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: えー、じゃあ、ちょっと最後に可愛くポーズ決めて、写真撮って終わりにしようかなと思います。
subtitles.english: Alright, then let's strike a cute pose at the end, take a photo, and wrap things up.

subtitles.original: 可愛くですね！わかりました！
subtitles.english: A cute pose, right? Got it!

subtitles.original: 全力で、みんなそれぞれ、可愛いポーズね！
subtitles.english: Do your absolute best, everyone make your own cute pose, okay?

subtitles.original: フリじゃないよ！可愛くだね！アイドルらしく！
subtitles.english: It's not a setup! Just cute, right? Like idols!

subtitles.original: いっせーのーで！
subtitles.english: Ready, set, go!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って！可愛いのはどれ！？裏切ったな！？
subtitles.english: Wait a minute! Which one is cute?! You betrayed us, didn't you?!

subtitles.original: Realize!
subtitles.english: [Song: Realize!]

subtitles.original: 無口なハート開いたら
subtitles.english: If you open your quiet heart...

subtitles.original: 進もう 声合わせて
subtitles.english: ...let's move forward, our voices in harmony!

subtitles.original: キラキラしている自分を
subtitles.english: The sparkling version of myself...

subtitles.original: 掴もう 大好きなことしよう
subtitles.english: ...let's seize it and do what we love!

subtitles.original: 勝ち負けだなんて関係ないともがいて
subtitles.english: Struggling, saying winning or losing doesn't matter,

subtitles.original: さあ 手と手繋いで
subtitles.english: now, hand in hand...

subtitles.original: Hey!
subtitles.english: Hey!

subtitles.original: 旅を始めよう
subtitles.english: ...let's start our journey!

subtitles.original: Hey! Let's go! Party time!
subtitles.english: Hey! Let's go! Party time!

subtitles.original: 1, 2, 3, Realize! 飛び立とうみんなで
subtitles.english: 1, 2, 3, Realize! Let's take off together!

subtitles.original: 絶対諦めたくないから
subtitles.english: Because we absolutely don't want to give up!

subtitles.original: Let's dream do my best! 明日はきっと輝いてる
subtitles.english: Let's dream, do my best! Tomorrow will surely be shining!

subtitles.original: 力合わせて ときめき探して
subtitles.english: Combining our strength, searching for excitement,

subtitles.original: いつか行こうよ プリパラ
subtitles.english: let's go to PriPara someday!

subtitles.original: くよくよしている自分を
subtitles.english: The worrying version of myself...

subtitles.original: 変えよう みんなが待ってるよ
subtitles.english: ...let's change it, everyone is waiting for you!

subtitles.original: どんな壁だって
subtitles.english: No matter what wall stands in our way...
